inputs.titre: Lance Armstrong est déchu de ses sept titres du Tour de France pour dopage

reason: The image depicts a cyclist in a rural setting. The presence of modern cycling equipment (helmet, sunglasses, clothing, and potentially the bicycle itself) are anachronisms, but the setting is generally consistent with the French countryside in 2012. No overt fantastical elements are present. The buildings appear to be older structures, which is appropriate. The absence of clearly modern technological elements (smartphones, cars) is also a plus. The modern design of the cycling gear is the most significant issue.
